coverage: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
creator: Tom Fahy
description: The author disavows this book in its entirety, and in fact, reproves it. The unsuspecting reader, then, is enjoined to treat it as a mere curiosity, and to hold it in no greater esteem than may be rightfully assigned to any misguided work of Gnosticism.
subject: Meta-Narrative
Literary Fiction
Narrative Cryptography
Information Management
Gnosticism
Literary Criticism

title: Orchard Park and Other Works
